rows.sourceLabel: Approved brand foundations source file - Lay's 2026 planning
rows.sourceOwner: Brand Marketing / Brand Strategy source owner
rows.brandStatement: Replace with the approved brand statement.
brandDna: Replace with approved brand foundation one.
Replace with approved brand foundation two.
rows.portfolioContext: Replace with the approved portfolio role or brand context.
claimsNotToMake: Do not infer positioning, objectives, or creative platform from this foundations-only file.
caveats: Template values must be replaced by approved source-owner values before use.
Foundations-only files do not satisfy positioning/objective or creative/claims readiness.
This file shape is for source-owner handoff; replace template values with approved source data.
Brand foundations must not be inferred from BBE scores or typology.

sourceFiles.sourceLabel: Approved positioning and objectives source file - Lay's 2026 planning

rows.sourceLabel: Approved positioning and objectives source file - Lay's 2026 planning
planningPriorities: Replace with approved planning priority one.
Replace with approved planning priority two.
claimsNotToMake: Do not treat planning priorities as diagnostic recommendations.
caveats: Template values must be replaced by approved source-owner values before use.
Positioning/objective files do not satisfy brand foundations or creative/claims readiness.
Positioning and objectives must come from an approved brand book, strategy brief, or annual planning source.
Do not infer strategic intent from diagnosis output.

sourceFiles.sourceLabel: Approved creative platform and claims source file - Lay's 2026 planning

rows.sourceLabel: Approved creative platform and claims source file - Lay's 2026 planning
rows.sourceOwner: Brand Marketing / Creative or Legal Review owner
rows.creativePlatform: Replace with approved creative platform language.
approvedClaims: Replace with a claim the team is allowed to use.
claimsNotToMake: Replace with known claim boundaries or claims the team should not make.
caveats: Template values must be replaced by approved source-owner values before use.
Creative platform and claims files do not satisfy foundations or positioning/objective readiness.
Do not invent campaign platforms or claims from BBE evidence.
Treatment language is not approved claim language.
